metadata.title: Party All the Time
metadata.lyrics:
[00:46.70] Girl, I can't understand it, why you wanna hurt me?
[00:53.85] After all of the things I've done for you
[01:00.70] I buy you champagne and roses, put diamonds on your finger (diamonds on your finger)
[01:07.91] But still you hang out all night, what am I to do?
[01:12.90] My girl wants to party all the time, party all the time, party all the time
[01:19.92] My girl wants to party all the time, party all the time
[01:27.22] She parties all the time, woo-hoo, ooh-ooh
[01:34.30] (Party all the time) she likes to party all the time
[01:41.43] (Party all the time) woo-hoo, hoo-hoo-hoo-hoo, ooh-ooh-ooh
[01:48.55] (Party all the time) she likes to party all the time
[01:55.70] (Party all the time) girl, I seen you in clubs, just hangin' out and dancin'
[02:04.72] You give your number to every man you see
[02:11.52] You never come home at night because you're out romancin'
[02:19.15] I wish you bring some of your love home to me
[02:23.73] But my girl wants to party all the time, party all the time, party all the time
[02:31.27] My girl wants to party all the time, party all the time
[02:37.90] My girl wants to party all the time, party all the time, party all the time
[02:45.10] My girl wants to party all the time, party all the time, yeah
[03:02.85] Party, party, party, party, party, party, party, party, party, party (she likes to party all the time)
[03:19.98] Woo-ooh-ooh (woo-hoo, ooh-ooh-ooh)
[03:27.19] She likes to party all the time, yeah (woo-hoo, hoo-hoo-hoo-hoo, ooh-ooh-ooh)
[03:33.25] She lets her hair down, she likes to party down
[03:40.24] (Party all the time) she likes to party, she likes to party down
[03:44.55] (Woo-hoo, hoo-hoo-hoo-hoo, ooh-ooh-ooh)
[03:47.35] (Party all the time) you wanna get down and party, yeah
[03:54.04] Ho!
[03:55.78]
